current.headline: Spain face Austria with two-goal margin in focus
current.summary: Spain's knockout meeting with Austria turns on whether their midfield control and wide attackers can create enough separation, while Austria's pressing and set-piece threat keep the two-goal margin difficult to call.

items.headline: Spain's attacking depth makes the margin question live
items.summary: The case for Spain covering a two-goal margin rests on sustained possession, early pressure and whether their forwards turn territory into clear chances before Austria settle into the match.

items.headline: Austria's press can keep the tie tighter than the market expects
items.summary: Austria's path to a No result is simple: disrupt Spain's build-up, avoid conceding early and keep the match within one goal deep into the second half.
